project.name: TILDA - Parking
project.description: TILDA processes on-street, off-street, obstacle, crossing, and public transport context tags from OpenStreetMap to analyze parking space availability and constraints.

tags.description: Used to identify roads, driveways, crossing lines, and public transport stops relevant to parking analysis.
